title: TUI /!: std::process::Command blocks tokio event loop
description: tui/src/event.rs handle_slash bang arm calls std::process::Command::new().output() on a tokio worker thread (blocking syscall). A slow command freezes the entire TUI loop: no keyboard, no relay events, no reconnection during that window. This is worse than the nie-po5v.17 ticket indicates - it stalls all relay events, not just UI redraws. Fix: use tokio::process::Command.
